name: Akelius Residential Property AB (publ)
summary: Akelius Residential Property AB (publ) engages in the management, leasing, service, upgrades, projects, purchases, sales, and valuation of properties. The company offers 44,835 residential units in Sweden, Germany, Canada, England, France, the United States, and Denmark. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Akelius Residential Property AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Akelius Apartments Ltd.
